MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TWITTER, INC., TWITTER INTERNATIONAL COMPANY's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The application of Patrick J. Carome to appear pro hac vice as counsel for defendants Twitter, Inc. and Twitter International Company is granted. No opposition filed, and the verified application conforms to CRC 9.40.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
